Package org.eventb.core.tests.pm

Class PendingSubgoalTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pm.BasicTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pm.TestPM
org.eventb.core.tests.pm.PendingSubgoalTests
public class PendingSubgoalTests extends TestPM
Unit tests for the pending subgoal management in IUserSupport

    Method

    void
    createProofFiles()
     
    void
    testBranchCloseFirst()
    Ensures that the current node after closing the last node of a tree is the first pending subgoal of the tree.
    void
    testBranchCloseNext()
    Ensures that the current node after closing a branch is after the root of that branch, when present.
    void
    testFirstChild()
    Ensures that the current node after applying a tactic is the first created child.
    void
    testFirstSubgoal()
    Ensures that the current node when loading an unproved PO is open.
    void
    testSecondChild()
    Ensures that the current node after closing the first child is the second child.
    void
    testSecondThenThirdChild()
    Ensures that the current node after closing the second child is the third child.
    void
    testThirdThenFirstChild()
    Ensures that the current node after closing the third child is the first child.
